TYPES.FPCLINE: TT_LINES TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_TLINE.
TT_VBAP1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TY_VBAP,

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: * SPLIT temp AT '.' INTO temp temp1.
READ TABLE it_final INTO wa_final INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM adrc INTO ls_adrc_ag
SELECT SINGLE * FROM adrc INTO ls_adrc_we
SELECT ZOTYPE INTO VOTYPE FROM ZSAORDERCHK
VCNAMEARABIC = 'ةدودحملا طسوألا قرشلا زلورتنوكولف لافلد ةكرش'.
SELECT FROM ADRC AS A INNER JOIN T005T AS B
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbak INTO gv_vbak
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbkd INTO gv_vbkd
* lv_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
lT_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_PO wa_lines-tdline INTO GV_PO SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'ZZ99' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines1) ).
SELECT SINGLE TEXT1 INTO GV_PAYTERM FROM T052U WHERE ZTERM = GV_VBKD-ZTERM.
* WHERE vbeln = wa_final-vbeln AND posnr = wa_final-posnr.
SELECT FROM ADRC AS A INNER JOIN T005T AS B
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbak INTO gv_vbak
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbkd INTO gv_vbkd
* lv_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE GV_PO wa_lines-tdline INTO GV_PO SEPARATED BY space.
DATA : VDT(2) TYPE C,VMN(2) TYPE C,VYR(4) TYPE C.
CONCATENATE VYR '-' VMN '-' VDT INTO GVORDDT.
SELECT SINGLE TEXT1 INTO GV_PAYTERM FROM T052U WHERE ZTERM = GV_VBKD-ZTERM.
** CONCATENATE LV_SALESPERSON wa_lines-tdline INTO LV_SALESPERSON SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z102' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
*SELECT SINGLE MAKTX INTO V_DESC FROM MAKT
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE WA_MAT_TEXT wa_lines-tdline INTO WA_MAT_TEXT SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_NAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbap INTO wa_vbap
WHERE vbeln = wa_final-vbeln AND posnr = wa_final-posnr.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE WA_CUST_MAT LS_TLINE-tdline INTO WA_CUST_MAT SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = '0001' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
LV_SUBTOTAL_AMT = LV_BASE_AMT + LV_CMAT + LV_DISC + LV_ZDC1 + LV_ZIN1 + LV_ZPFO + LV_ZTE1 + LV_ZOTH + LV_ZFR1.
ls_word-decword 'HALALAS ONLY' INTO LV_WORD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
ls_word-decword 'CENTS ' INTO LV_WORD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SELECT ZOTYPE INTO VOTYPE FROM ZSAORDERCHK
VCNAMEARABIC = 'ةدودحملا طسوألا قرشلا زلورتنوكولف لافلد ةكرش'.
*SELECT SINGLE MAKTX INTO V_DESC FROM MAKT
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE WA_MAT_TEXT wa_lines-tdline INTO WA_MAT_TEXT SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_NAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* WHERE vbeln = wa_final-vbeln AND posnr = wa_final-posnr.
SELECT VBELN , POSNR ,CUSTDELDATE FROM VBAP INTO TABLE @IT_VBAP_DATA
READ TABLE IT_VBAP_DATA INTO DATA(WA_vbap1) WITH KEY VBELN = wa_final-vbeln
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE WA_CUST_MAT LS_TLINE-tdline INTO WA_CUST_MAT SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = '0001' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
LV_SUBTOTAL_AMT = LV_BASE_AMT + LV_CMAT + LV_DISC + LV_ZDC1 + LV_ZIN1 + LV_ZPFO + LV_ZTE1 + LV_ZOTH + LV_ZFR1.
ls_word-decword 'HALALAS ONLY' INTO LV_WORD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
ls_word-decword 'CENTS ' INTO LV_WORD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
ls_word-decword 'HALALAS ONLY' INTO LV_WORD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
ls_word-decword 'CENTS ' INTO LV_WORD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SELECT VBELN , POSNR ,CUSTDELDATE FROM VBAP INTO TABLE @IT_VBAP_DATA
READ TABLE IT_VBAP_DATA INTO WA_VBAP_DATA WITH KEY VBELN = wa_final1-vbeln
MODIFY IT_FINAL1 from WA_FINAL1 TRANSPORTING zdate.
